notes: Convert FAQ to collapsible accordion on Online Ordering page

content.value:
Online Ordering FAQ

Can online ordering work with my current POS?

Usually yes. We map product structure, modifiers, taxes, and pickup rules to reduce double handling.

Do I need a mobile app?

No. Most businesses start with a fast mobile web ordering flow and optional QR entry points.

How quickly can this go live?

Simple setups can go live quickly after menu cleanup, payment setup, and test-order validation.
